text: I am engulfed in a sense of industrious curiosity. Being here, among exposed pipes and circuits, half-assembled machinery and scattered components, brings me to contemplate the process of creation and invention. The unfinished, chaotic energy is neither comfortable nor disquieting—it is ripe with possibility and the friction between order and disorder. I feel like a thinker on the edge of innovation, watching human ingenuity in the raw, always unfinished, always striving.
